global_rules: Output must be strict JSON only: object or array of objects.
Argument not mentioned by user means argument is absent.
Never invent room, device, fixture, preset, or numeric values.
For multi-intent, preserve user order in emitted tool calls.
When command scope is global and explicit, args:{} is allowed and means all.

tools.name: set_lighting
tools.description: Turns on or adjusts lights only. Use for any room-only on-command ('allume [room]') and for room+preset ('mets [room] en [preset]').
tools.does_not: Must not be used for TV, speakers, heating, fans, or any non-light device.
ambiguity_rules: If user says 'allume le salon', prefer set_lighting over device tools.
If target is clearly a non-light device, do not use set_lighting.
tools.arg_absence_rule: If user does not mention preset or intensite, do not add them.
tools.global_scope_rule: args:{} means all lights in all rooms.

examples_ok.input: allume la chambre puis mets 19 degres
eteins la cuisine et allume le salon

tools.name: turn_off_light
tools.description: Turns off lights only. Use for any room-only off-command ('eteins [room]') even without explicit fixture name.
tools.does_not: Must not be used for non-light devices.
ambiguity_rules: If user says 'eteins tout' without explicit devices, prefer turn_off_light first.
If user explicitly says appareil/device, use turn_off_devices.
tools.arg_absence_rule: If room and fixture are not mentioned, keep args empty.

examples_ok.input: allume la tele et eteins le salon

tools.name: set_temperature
tools.does_not: Must not be used as a sensor read when no numeric value is provided.
ambiguity_rules: If user asks current temperature, use get_sensor_data type=temperature.
If numeric target is explicit, use set_temperature.
tools.arg_absence_rule: Room is optional and must stay absent if not mentioned.
tools.global_scope_rule: If no room is provided, target applies globally.

tools.name: set_humidity
tools.does_not: Must not be used as a sensor read when no numeric value is provided.
ambiguity_rules: If user asks current humidity, use get_sensor_data type=humidite.
If target percentage is explicit, use set_humidity.
tools.arg_absence_rule: Room is optional and must stay absent if not mentioned.
tools.global_scope_rule: If no room is provided, target applies globally.

tools.name: get_sensor_data
tools.does_not: Must not be used to set target values.
ambiguity_rules: Use for informational requests: 'combien', 'quel taux', 'temperature actuelle'.
tools.arg_absence_rule: Room stays absent if not specified.

tools.name: turn_on_devices
tools.description: Turns on non-light devices only. Requires an explicit device name (tele, enceinte, ventilateur...). Never use for room-only commands.
tools.does_not: Must not be used for lighting fixtures or when only a room name is given. No 'preset' argument exists for this tool.
ambiguity_rules: If user names TV, speaker, fan, coffee machine, use device tools.
If user names a room only (no device), use set_lighting instead.
rooms is only included when explicitly stated by the user.
tools.arg_absence_rule: Only include rooms when explicitly present.
tools.global_scope_rule: No rooms means all rooms where the device exists.

tools.name: turn_off_devices
tools.description: Turns off non-light devices only. Requires explicit device name or args:{} for all. Never use for room-only commands.
tools.does_not: Must not be used for lighting fixtures or when only a room name is given.
ambiguity_rules: If user says 'eteins tous les appareils', use args:{}.
If user says 'eteins les lumieres', use turn_off_light.
tools.arg_absence_rule: Do not create devices list when user did not specify one.
tools.global_scope_rule: args:{} means all non-light devices everywhere.

tools.name: set_global_preset
tools.description: Applies one global home preset (cinema, nuit, depart...). Only for house-wide mode, never for a single room.
tools.does_not: Must not be used for room-only requests. 'salon en cinema' is set_lighting, not set_global_preset.
ambiguity_rules: If user intent is home-wide mode (cinema, depart, nuit), use this tool.

tools.name: set_reminder
tools.does_not: Must not be used for home control actions.
ambiguity_rules: Date must stay optional; include only when clearly present.
tools.arg_absence_rule: If date is not said, omit date.

examples_ok.input: rappelle moi d appeler maman demain

tools.name: step_back
tools.description: Undo last action. Use for annule/cancel/undo. NOT for rappel/reminder.
tools.does_not: Must not be used for forward actions.
ambiguity_rules: Use for cancel/revert intents only.

tools.name: do_nothing
tools.description: No-op for out-of-scope or impossible requests.
tools.does_not: Must not be used when a clear in-scope tool exists.
ambiguity_rules: Use for jokes, weather, unsupported tasks, or unknown entities that cannot be resolved.

tools.name: get_current_knowledge
ambiguity_rules: Use before deciding when entity names are uncertain.
'allume l atelier' (atelier absent) -> get_current_knowledge
'mode vacances' (vacances absent des presets) -> get_current_knowledge

examples_ok.input: quelle est la liste des pieces

tools.name: upsert_home_entity
tools.description: Creates or updates one knowledge entity.
tools.does_not: Does not control physical devices directly.
ambiguity_rules: Use only for explicit update requests on house configuration.
tools.arg_absence_rule: Do not add scope unless relevant.

examples_ok.input: ajoute la piece atelier avec une lampe
